input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.11.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.11.3
            TITLE: when a pass is to be made:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.11.3: When a pass is to be made:
D.12.11.3 When a pass is to be made:  
a. A slower leading vehicle will receive a Blue Flag  
b. The slower vehicle must move into the slow lane and decelerate.  
c. The following faster vehicle will continue in the fast lane and make the pass.  
d. The vehicle that had been passed may reenter traffic only under the control of the 
passing zone exit flag.

final_answer:
D.12.11.3 When a pass is to be made:
a. A slower leading vehicle will receive a Blue Flag
b. The slower vehicle must move into the slow lane and decelerate.
c. The following faster vehicle will continue in the fast lane and make the pass.
d. The vehicle that had been passed may reenter traffic only under the control of the passing zone exit flag.
